reference: Hello. I just read through your question. You can safely use Ibuprofen for the symptoms you describe. I would, however, consider having him seen by his doctor if the symptoms persist beyond another one-two days.
text: Hello, I just read through your question. You can safely use ibuprofen for the symptoms you described. I would, however, consider having him seen by his doctor if the symptoms persist beyond another 1-2 days.
